dismissalText.commentary: Travis Head c Green b Kartik Tyagi 46 (21b 6x4 3x6 28m) SR: 219.04

dismissalComment.html: Eden finally finds its voice!! Green at mid-on moves back a few steps and takes the catch with a reverse cup. Short of a length at 142kph from Tyagi, who bowls this around seventh stump. Head looks to swat it back down the ground, but loses his bottom hand off the bat. The ball is ballooned up without timing, and Head falls after 46 off 21 balls

dismissalText.commentary: Abhishek Sharma c Varun b Muzarabani 48 (21b 4x4 4x6 48m) SR: 228.57

dismissalComment.html: great catch by Varun!! He isn't doing it with the ball at the moment, but he does it really well on the field. But wait. Abhishek is hanging around to check for the cleanliness of the catch, as it's referred by the umpire. Varun was at deep square leg, and went low to try and catch the ball, which was dipping on him. The third umpire checks multiple replays from multiple angles, even as it appears that Varun's hands are beneath the ball. But we'll wait for that confirmation. Repeated change of angles finally satisfies the third umpire. He gives it out, and Eden roars. Abhishek walks back frustrated

dismissalText.commentary: Ishan Kishan c Singh b Muzarabani 14 (9b 3x4 0x6 15m) SR: 155.55

dismissalComment.html: well taken by Rinku at the deep cover-point boundary!! He tip-toes on the fence, but his left leg doesn't touch the boundary. Short of a length from Muzarabani, who got the ball to climb outside off. Kishan looked to slash at it aerially by riding the bounce, and nearly timed it all the way for six

dismissalText.commentary: Heinrich Klaasen c Ramandeep Singh b Muzarabani 52 (35b 4x4 1x6 63m) SR: 148.57

dismissalText.commentary: Aniket Verma c Singh b Roy 1 (4b 0x4 0x6 5m) SR: 25

dismissalComment.html: Rinku takes another good catch!! KKR are back into the contest. SRH have to rebuild. Anukul teased Aniket by going on a short of a length, and wide of off. Aniket went slashing away from his body and lofted it wide of long-off, but Rinku, at the long-off boundary, moved swiftly to his left to pouch the ball. It's all going KKR's way suddenly

dismissalText.commentary: Salil Arora b Arora 0 (1b 0x4 0x6 1m) SR: 0

dismissalComment.html: Knocks him over first ball! Arora's brilliant spell at the death continues. Nails this yorker, and Salil Arora has to make the long walk back the way he came from. Fired in at 138kph in the blockhole, Arora was looking to whip it across the line and is beaten by the pace. The ball goes off his pads and onto the stumps

dismissalText.commentary: Cameron Green run out (Malinga) 2 (2b 0x4 0x6 7m) SR: 100

dismissalComment.html: wow, he's run out this time!! Raghuvanshi gave up midway into the run, as Malinga whipped the bails off at his end. This is what happened earlier: Malinga bowled it full, as Raghuvanshi drove it back. Malinga fumbled, though, as the ball flicked off his boot and dribbled back. Hang on!! Just as Raghuvanshi made his way to the boundary to walk back, he's stopped to confirm who's the batter who's actually out as the batters crossed while Malinga broke the stumps. And guess what? It's Green who's out. Damn!! What luck!!

dismissalText.commentary: Cameron Green run out (Malinga) 2 (2b 0x4 0x6 7m) SR: 100

dismissalComment.html: wow, he's run out this time!! Raghuvanshi gave up midway into the run, as Malinga whipped the bails off at his end. This is what happened earlier: Malinga bowled it full, as Raghuvanshi drove it back. Malinga fumbled, though, as the ball flicked off his boot and dribbled back. Hang on!! Just as Raghuvanshi made his way to the boundary to walk back, he's stopped to confirm who's the batter who's actually out as the batters crossed while Malinga broke the stumps. And guess what? It's Green who's out. Damn!! What luck!!

dismissalText.commentary: Angkrish Raghuvanshi run out (Malinga/Shivang Kumar) 52 (29b 6x4 2x6 48m) SR: 179.31

dismissalComment.html: Mix-up, and after all that, Raghuvanshi is run-out in the end! Rinku slashes this to backward point and takes off, but is also ball-watching and doesn't quite commit to the run. Raghuvanshi has run more than half the length of the pitch when Rinku stops and can't really scramble back in time. Rinku says it was Raghuvanshi's call. Good throw, close to the stumps at the non-striker's end and Shivang does the rest

dismissalText.commentary: Sunil Narine c Verma b Malinga 12 (4b 0x4 2x6 7m) SR: 300

dismissalComment.html: This time it's taken at long-on. Aniket Verma the fielder. Malinga went for the blockhole with pace off. Narine can't quite get under it as he tries to loft it down the ground. Aniket gets behind the line and makes a timely jump to grab it above head height, while making sure the momentum doesn't take him over the rope

dismissalText.commentary: Kartik Tyagi c †Ishan Kishan b Unadkat 5 (5b 1x4 0x6 7m) SR: 100

dismissalComment.html: Gone! Umpire reckons Tyagi has nicked behind, but he's reviewed it. Full outside off, Tyagi was looking to work it leg side. There was a noise as the ball went past the inside edge. Kishan was convinced, so was Unadkat and so was the umpire. And UltraEdge confirms it. KKR go nine down
